claim_boundary: No Evidence Docket, no empirical SOTA claim. Autonomous evidence production is allowed; autonomous claim promotion is not.
customer_data_boundary: Synthetic or customer-approved redacted inputs only; no raw PII or secrets.
regulated_boundary: Not legal, medical, HR, credit, insurance, investment, payment, custody, KYC/AML, or regulated decisioning.
token_boundary: $AGIALPHA is utility-only accounting; not equity, debt, yield, ROI, or token value evidence.
